pillar_metadata.name: Force
pillar_metadata.description: The application of energy to enact change in reality; determines what happens.

velocity_scaling.impact: Scales the physical movement and interaction strength of the unit.

production_output.formula: P_e = alpha * Force * Willpower * Awareness * Integrity
production_output.impact: Primary driver for the economic output of the organizational unit.

impotence.result: Inability to act; the unit remains static despite intent or awareness.

uncontrolled_impact.result: Systemic destruction; energy is applied randomly, increasing Harm (H) exponentially.
